name: Penne with Provencal Eggplant and Sweet Peppe
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Eggplants, unpeeled and cut into 1-inch cubes
3 Red, green or gold sweet peppers - thinly sliced
1 1/2 cups Firmly packed chopped fresh basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Place eggplant cubes in a shallow baking pan; toss with 1/3 cup olive oil, sprinkle with salt to taste, and bake at 400°F until cubes are soft but still hold their shape, about 30 minutes. Set aside to cool.
2. Heat 1/4 cup olive oil in a large heavy frying pan; add onions and sweet peppers and cook over very low heat until vegetables are quite tender and slightly caramelized, about 35 to 45 minutes. Stir in garlic and salt and pepper to taste. Cook for 5 minutes longer.
3. Combine the remaining olive oil, lemon juice, Italian spices, and salt and pepper to taste. Whisk and reserve.
4. Cook pasta in 4 quarts boiling water until al dente. Drain and rinse well in cold water, then drain again.
5. With a sharp knife, diagonally slice each piece of pasta in half crosswise. Toss in a large bowl with onion mixture and reserved dressing.
6. Toss eggplant cubes and chopped basil with pasta.
7. Garnish with basil leaves.
Serves 6 to 8 as a first course, 10 to 12 as a salad. Good side dish with barbecued tofu.
